heading: Today, Father’s Day
text: A good chance of passing showers, with a chance of scattered thunderstorms. Highs from the upper 60s to low 70s north, in the low to mid 70s elsewhere. Light northwest wind.

heading: Tonight
text: A few scattered evening showers, most likely in the north, tapering off overnight. Partial clearing. Lows in the 50s, a few 40s in the cold spots. Light wind.

heading: Monday
text: Morning sun north, becoming cloudy, with an increasing chance of showers more likely south of the Adirondacks and Rt. 4. Highs in the 70s, a few 60s over the higher elevations. Light and variable wind.
